title: Dockerfile downloads unpinned latest release
evidence: Dockerfile:3-5 uses curl to api.github.com/releases/latest with no version pin or SHA check
impact: Rebuilding the Docker image is non-reproducible and could pick up a malicious tag if the repo is compromised
recommendation: Pin release tag via build-arg; checksum-verify the tarball

title: 81 unwrap() calls in src/
impact: Panics on malformed input rather than returning Result; acceptable for CLI tools but reduces library-mode robustness
recommendation: Prioritize unwrap→Result on library entry points

title: One unsafe block (src/html.rs)
impact: Expected for HTML parsing FFI; isolated, reviewable

title: Clean 11-module domain decomposition
evidence: src/: main, lib, core, cache, cookies, css, gui, html, js, session, url
impact: Each concern in its own module; tests mirror this 1:1

title: Optional GUI via feature flag
evidence: Cargo.toml [dependencies] clap + directories both marked optional=true; Makefile build-gui target uses --features='gui'
impact: CLI-first, GUI-second without bloating the default binary
recommendation: None — worth imitating if SoNash ships multiple entry points

title: Mono-README documentation
evidence: README.md:293 lines, 29 sections; no docs/ tree; no CONTRIBUTING.md / SECURITY.md / CODE_OF_CONDUCT.md
impact: Zero-search documentation but nothing for contributors or vulnerability reporters
recommendation: Add SECURITY.md for vuln disclosure; CONTRIBUTING.md if the 6-maintainer model expects outside PRs

title: 18 install channels documented inline
evidence: README sections for Cargo, Homebrew, Chocolatey, Scoop, Winget, MacPorts, Snapcraft, Guix, NixPkgs, Flox, Pacman, aports, XBPS, FreeBSD pkg/ports, pkgsrc, Docker, pre-built binaries
impact: Packaging treated as a product dimension; each channel is a one-line reproducible install
recommendation: Extract — SoNash CLI helpers could adopt this distribution-catalog pattern

title: Per-module test mirror with fixtures
evidence: tests/ has 8 domain dirs (cli, core, css, html, js, cookies, url, session) + _data_/ fixtures; 50 test files total
impact: Predictable test location from file name; fixtures colocated
recommendation: Extract layout pattern for SoNash tests/ organization

title: CI matrix covers ubuntu/macos/windows/netbsd + CD
impact: High portability discipline; uncommon NetBSD inclusion signals care

title: Strict dep pinning (=X.Y.Z)
evidence: Cargo.toml uses = prefix on all direct deps
impact: Reproducibility over auto-upgrade — opposite of ^/~ default
recommendation: Consider for SoNash critical tooling (reviews pipeline scripts); evaluate trade-off with Dependabot PR volume

title: CC0-1.0 public domain license
impact: Zero-friction extraction/forking; rare for production tooling
recommendation: Informational — if SoNash ever extracts code, no attribution required

title: 15k stars, 451 forks, 6 authors, active
evidence: gh api repos/Y2Z/monolith: stargazers_count=15009, forks_count=451, pushed_at=2026-02-05
